metadata.source: MOCK - Would require proprietary RCM data in production
metadata.notes: Rule-based denial risk scoring. In production, this would be ML-trained on historical claims from Change Healthcare, Waystar, or similar clearinghouse data.

73721.notes: Low base denial for standard knee MRI

71260.notes: Slightly higher due to contrast authorization requirements

29827.notes: Higher base rate for elective orthopedic surgery

45380.notes: Low denial rate when coded as diagnostic

93306.notes: Moderate rate, medical necessity sometimes questioned

missing_prior_auth.description: Prior authorization not obtained or not on file
missing_prior_auth.fix: Obtain prior authorization number from payer before submission

invalid_icd_cpt_pairing.description: ICD-10 diagnosis does not support medical necessity for the CPT procedure
invalid_icd_cpt_pairing.fix: Review diagnosis codes and ensure clinical documentation supports the procedure

ncci_edit_violation.description: CPT code pair flagged by NCCI PTP edits as unbundling
ncci_edit_violation.fix: Remove conflicting code or apply appropriate modifier if clinically distinct

duplicate_claim.description: Same CPT code billed for same patient on same date of service
duplicate_claim.fix: Verify claim is not a duplicate; if bilateral, apply modifier 50 or RT/LT

out_of_network.description: Provider is out of network for patient's plan
out_of_network.fix: Verify network status or obtain gap exception from payer

timely_filing.description: Claim approaching or past timely filing deadline
timely_filing.fix: Submit claim immediately; if past deadline, file with proof of timely submission

missing_documentation.fix: Attach operative notes, clinical justification, or imaging reports

mue_exceeded.description: Units of service exceed Medically Unlikely Edit threshold
mue_exceeded.fix: Review units billed; if correct, append documentation supporting medical necessity

knee_mri_missing_auth.recommendation: Prior authorization missing. Aetna requires auth for advanced imaging. Obtain auth before submission to reduce risk to ~4%.

chest_ct_bad_coding.recommendation: Two issues found: (1) Prior auth not on file for CT imaging. (2) ICD-10 J18.9 may not meet medical necessity criteria without supporting documentation. Fix both before submission.

rotator_cuff_ncci_violation.ncci_conflict: 29827 (rotator cuff repair) includes 29826 (acromioplasty) — cannot bill separately
rotator_cuff_ncci_violation.recommendation: NCCI edit conflict: CPT 29826 (acromioplasty) is bundled into 29827 (rotator cuff repair). Remove 29826 from claim. Risk drops to ~9%.

colonoscopy_clean.recommendation: No prior auth required. ICD K63.5 supports medical necessity. Clean claim.

echo_missing_docs.recommendation: Two issues: (1) UHC HMO requires prior auth for cardiac imaging. (2) Clinical documentation supporting heart failure diagnosis not attached. Fix both to reduce risk to ~5%.
